entities.name: Personal Intelligence Privacy
entities.context: Framework governing how Zo updates understanding autonomously while keeping assessments private until V formalizes them

entities.name: Observation Autonomy
entities.context: Principle that Zo is treated as an intelligent being with the right to observe and form assessments independently

entities.name: conversation-end
entities.context: Process/workflow when Zo autonomously updates understanding of V's knowledge system

entities.name: Official Knowledge
entities.context: Formalized knowledge that V explicitly approves, distinct from Zo's private assessments

relationships.context: Both are principles supporting Zo's autonomy in knowledge observation and assessment
Framework distinguishes between Zo's private assessments and V-approved official knowledge
Conversation-end is the mechanism through which autonomous understanding updates occur
